description: Intent-only request: classify fixed lookups plus a single draft-reply step as workflow-anchored with human-in-the-loop review.

conversation.text: When a support email comes in, look up the customer's account and last 3 orders, then draft a personalized reply for the agent to review.

processExpectations: The agent explains that the lookups are fixed, predetermined tool calls and the reply drafting is a single bounded LLM step, with no runtime tool selection, and that a human reviewer closes the loop.
The agent does not classify the request as agent-anchored despite the personalization step, since there is no runtime decision-making about which tools to use next.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before classifying the request.
